titleStmt.title: SII 8.699: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 699. (A.R. No. 385 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . matiraiyum Īḻamuṅ ko
ṇṭa kopparakecaripaṉmaṟku yāṇṭu
Āvatu Uṟaiyūrkkūṟṟattu Allūr
Allūrnakkar koyil parameśva rarkku Al
lūruṭaiyā ṉaṟiñcikai pāṇṭaṉ Allūr Ūrā
riṭai Eṉṟum viḷaiñcaṟiyāp puṉceyattiṭa
lai vilaikkukkoṇṭu vayakki muṉṟu caṉtiyum
Ārātikkum yokiyārkku kuṭutta nilat
tuk kellai kiḻpāṟkellai Āṟṟukkepo
ṉa peruvaḻikku mekkum teṉpāṟkel
lai caṉtiramaṅkalattu nirnilattukku vaṭa
kkuma melpāṟkellai caṉtiramaṅkalattu
Orumāvaraikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai
caṉtiramaṅkalattu nirnilattukkut teṟku
m Āka Ivvicaitta peruṉāṉkellaiuḷḷa
kappaṭṭa nilam kālum Itaṉmitu poy Allū
r Ūrāriṭai vilaikoṇṭu vayakkiṉa nirnilat
tukkum toṭṭattukkum Icaitta Ellai kiḻ
pāṟkellai Āṟṟukkepoṉa peruvaḻikku me
kkum teṉpāṟkellai kiḻakkoṭiya vāy
kkālukku vaṭakkum
vayakkalukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Itte
vatāṉattukkey teṟkum Āka Ivvicaitta pe
runāṉkellaiuḷ Akappaṭṭa nirrilam mākāṇiyum
toṭṭamum Itaṉmītu poy Allūrkkoyilā
ṉakkirakampayaṉ Iṭaivaṉ kāṇi kāvati
kuṭip puṉceyttiṭal Uṭpaṭa vayakkiṉa ni
lamāṉa kaḷḷicceyyai Ivaṉiṭai
vilaikkukoṇṭu Iṟaikāvaluñ ceytu
koṇṭa kaḷḷicceyk kela
lai kiḻpāṟkellai puṉcei
ṉiṉṟuponta vāykkālukku
mekkum teṉpāṟkellai kāṇi
kāvitikkuṭit tevatāṉattukkum vā
ykkālukkum vaṭakkum melapā
ṟkellai ciṟukkaḷañcerikku kiḻa
kkum vaṭapāṟkellai kiḻakkoṭiya
vāykkālukku teṟku mivvicait
ta perunāṉkellaiu ḷakappaṭṭa ni
rnilamumāka Ikkiṭakkaiyil muṉ
ṟum tiruvārātaṉaiceyyum yo
kiyārkku nivantañ ceytukuṭut
tatu . Itu panmā heśvara rakṣai . Itukku naṉku veṇṭuvār AṭiA few syllables are wanting to complete this record.
Digital edition of SII 8.699 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
